capabilities.name: Product & Product Variants
capabilities.description: Configure products, variants, categories, UoM, routes, tracking modes, and valuation categories.
examples: Create a storable product with FIFO valuation
Enable lot tracking on a product
Set reordering rules on a product

capabilities.name: Warehouses & Locations
capabilities.description: Manage warehouses, location hierarchies, location types, and storage strategies.
examples: Add shelf locations inside a warehouse

capabilities.name: Stock Moves & Pickings
capabilities.description: Create and manage stock moves, pickings, picking types, move lines, reservation, and validation.

capabilities.name: Routes & Rules
capabilities.description: Configure pull/push routes, procurement groups, and MTS/MTO supply rules.
examples: Create a custom route between warehouses
Troubleshoot a route that does not trigger

capabilities.name: Reordering Rules
capabilities.description: Manage reordering rules, min/max quantities, and automatic procurement.
examples: Create a reordering rule for a product

capabilities.name: Lots & Serial Tracking
capabilities.description: Enable lot/serial tracking, manage lots, expiration dates, and removal strategies.
examples: Trace a lot through all moves

capabilities.name: Inventory Valuation
capabilities.description: Configure inventory valuation categories, cost methods, and automatic valuation entries.
examples: Set FIFO cost method on a category

capabilities.name: MTS/MTO & Procurement
capabilities.description: Configure Make-to-Stock vs Make-to-Order behavior and procurement flows.
examples: Use MTO on sales order lines

capabilities.name: Barcode Operations
capabilities.description: Use Enterprise stock_barcode for mobile picking, receiving, transfers, and inventory adjustments.
examples: Pick a delivery order with barcode
